payload.topic: SEO Ops Content Refresh Queue System
payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE Content Refresh Queue System for ongoing SEO operations. Include: 1) Content decay identification methodology (traffic drop >15%, position drop >3 spots, CTR decline), 2) Refresh priority scoring matrix (traffic value x decay severity / effort required), 3) 6 types of content refresh (update stats, expand sections, add media, improve CWV, merge thin content, redirect obsolete), 4) Refresh workflow: identify → audit → plan → execute → measure, 5) Content refresh calendar template, 6) Before/after tracking methodology. Context: This is for AgenticMarketingPro, an AI marketing OS with blog content about AI marketing, SEO, and automation.
